2026-04-20T05:58:31.6835269Z ##[group]Run # Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)
2026-04-20T05:58:31.6835850Z [36;1m# Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)[0m

2026-04-20T06:02:49.1516759Z ##[group]Run # Fix permissions on firewall logs so they can be uploaded as artifacts
2026-04-20T06:02:49.1517377Z [36;1m# Fix permissions on firewall logs so they can be uploaded as artifacts[0m
2026-04-20T06:02:49.1517837Z [36;1m# AWF runs with sudo, creating files owned by root[0m
2026-04-20T06:02:49.1518282Z [36;1msudo chmod -R a+r /tmp/gh-aw/sandbox/firewall/logs 2>/dev/null || true[0m
2026-04-20T06:02:49.1518914Z [36;1m# Only run awf logs summary if awf command exists (it may not be installed if workflow failed before install step)[0m
2026-04-20T06:02:49.1519453Z [36;1mif command -v awf &> /dev/null; then[0m
2026-04-20T06:02:49.1519796Z [36;1m  awf logs summary | tee -a "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"[0m
2026-04-20T06:02:49.1520107Z [36;1melse[0m
